predicate_mappings.sequence_assigned_slot: the sequence {} is assigned to the appointment slot {}
predicate_mappings.slot_allocated: a slot is allocated for the sequence {}
predicate_mappings.consent_verified: consent is verified for the sequence {}
predicate_mappings.preparation_completed: preparation is completed for the sequence {}
predicate_mappings.sequence_uses_lab_resource: the sequence {} uses the laboratory resource {}
predicate_mappings.sequence_assigned_clinical_staff: the sequence {} is assigned to the clinical staff {}
predicate_mappings.sequence_uses_imaging_staff: the sequence {} uses the imaging staff {}
predicate_mappings.sequence_reserved_supply: the sequence {} has reserved the supply {}
predicate_mappings.sequence_assigned_imaging_timeslot: the sequence {} is assigned the imaging timeslot {}
predicate_mappings.imaging_acquisition_confirmed: the imaging acquisition for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.device_check_completed: the device check for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.prep_pending_flag: the preparation pending flag for {} is set
predicate_mappings.protocol_approved_for_sequence: the protocol {} is approved for the sequence {}
predicate_mappings.escort_or_transport_confirmed: escort or transport is confirmed for {}

predicate_mappings.lab_resource_available: a lab resource is available for {}
predicate_mappings.lab_sample_slot_available: the lab sample slot {} is available

predicate_mappings.sequence_imaging_staff_compatible: the care sequence {} is compatible with the imaging staff {}

predicate_mappings.sequence_contrast_compatible: the care sequence {} is compatible with the contrast agent {}

preconditions: I can only register a care sequence A if it is not the case that the sequence A is registered and it is not the case that the sequence for A is completed
effects: Once I register a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence A is registered

assign_appointment_slot.description: assign a care sequence A to an appointment slot B
preconditions: I can only assign a care sequence A to an appointment slot B if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and a slot is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the appointment slot B
I can only assign a care sequence A to an appointment slot B if it is not the case that a slot is allocated for the sequence A
effects: Once I assign a care sequence A to an appointment slot B, it is the case that the sequence A is assigned to the appointment slot B and a slot is allocated for the sequence A
Once I assign a care sequence A to an appointment slot B, it is not the case anymore that a slot is available for B

release_appointment_slot_and_reset.description: release an appointment slot B from a care sequence A and reset the sequence
preconditions: I can only release an appointment slot B from a care sequence A and reset the sequence if it is the case that the sequence A is assigned to the appointment slot B

I can only release an appointment slot B from a care sequence A and reset the sequence if it is not the case that the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and it is not the case that the staffing for A is confirmed
effects: Once I release an appointment slot B from a care sequence A and reset the sequence, it is the case that a slot is available for B

Once I release an appointment slot B from a care sequence A and reset the sequence, it is not the case anymore that the sequence A is assigned to the appointment slot B and it is not the case anymore that a slot is allocated for the sequence A and it is not the case anymore that consent is verified for the sequence A and it is not the case anymore that preparation is completed for the sequence A and it is not the case anymore that the preparation pending flag for A is set and it is not the case anymore that the procedure for A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that the lab sample for A is pending

reserve_imaging_device.description: reserve an imaging device B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only reserve an imaging device B for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and the device B is available
effects: Once I reserve an imaging device B for a care sequence A, it is the case that A has a reservation for the imaging device B
Once I reserve an imaging device B for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the device B is available

release_imaging_device_reservation.description: release reservation of an imaging device B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of an imaging device B for a care sequence A if it is the case that A has a reservation for the imaging device B
effects: Once I release reservation of an imaging device B for a care sequence A, it is the case that the device B is available
Once I release reservation of an imaging device B for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reservation for the imaging device B

confirm_device_assignment.description: confirm device assignment of an imaging device B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only confirm device assignment of an imaging device B for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and A has a reservation for the imaging device B
I can only confirm device assignment of an imaging device B for a care sequence A if it is not the case that consent is verified for the sequence A
effects: Once I confirm device assignment of an imaging device B for a care sequence A, it is the case that consent is verified for the sequence A

allocate_prep_resource_and_verify_consen.description: allocate a patient prep resource B and verify consent for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only allocate a patient prep resource B and verify consent for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the preparation resource B is available
I can only allocate a patient prep resource B and verify consent for a care sequence A if it is not the case that consent is verified for the sequence A
effects: Once I allocate a patient prep resource B and verify consent for a care sequence A, it is the case that consent is verified for the sequence A and the preparation pending flag for A is set
Once I allocate a patient prep resource B and verify consent for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the preparation resource B is available

perform_nurse_preparation_step.description: perform nurse preparation step for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C
preconditions: I can only perform nurse preparation step for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C if it is the case that consent is verified for the sequence A and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and A has a reservation for the imaging device B and the assigned nurse C is available
I can only perform nurse preparation step for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C if it is not the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A
effects: Once I perform nurse preparation step for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C, it is the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A
Once I perform nurse preparation step for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C, it is not the case anymore that the preparation pending flag for A is set

apply_protocol_supply_preparation.description: apply protocol supply preparation for a care sequence A using an imaging protocol B
preconditions: I can only apply protocol supply preparation for a care sequence A using an imaging protocol B if it is the case that a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the protocol B is approved for the sequence A
I can only apply protocol supply preparation for a care sequence A using an imaging protocol B if it is not the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A
effects: Once I apply protocol supply preparation for a care sequence A using an imaging protocol B, it is the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A
Once I apply protocol supply preparation for a care sequence A using an imaging protocol B, it is not the case anymore that the preparation pending flag for A is set

reserve_lab_resource.description: reserve a laboratory resource B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only reserve a laboratory resource B for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and a lab resource is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the laboratory resource B
effects: Once I reserve a laboratory resource B for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B
Once I reserve a laboratory resource B for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that a lab resource is available for B

release_lab_resource_reservation.description: release reservation of a laboratory resource B from a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a laboratory resource B from a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B
effects: Once I release reservation of a laboratory resource B from a care sequence A, it is the case that a lab resource is available for B
Once I release reservation of a laboratory resource B from a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B

assign_clinical_staff.description: assign a clinical staff B to a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical staff B to a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and clinical staff is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the clinical staff B
effects: Once I assign a clinical staff B to a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff B
Once I assign a clinical staff B to a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that clinical staff is available for B

release_clinical_staff.description: release a clinical staff B from a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical staff B from a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff B
effects: Once I release a clinical staff B from a care sequence A, it is the case that clinical staff is available for B
Once I release a clinical staff B from a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff B

reserve_imaging_staff.description: reserve an imaging staff B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only reserve an imaging staff B for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and imaging staff is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the imaging staff B
effects: Once I reserve an imaging staff B for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence A uses the imaging staff B
Once I reserve an imaging staff B for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that imaging staff is available for B

release_imaging_staff.description: release an imaging staff B from a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only release an imaging staff B from a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A uses the imaging staff B
effects: Once I release an imaging staff B from a care sequence A, it is the case that imaging staff is available for B
Once I release an imaging staff B from a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the sequence A uses the imaging staff B

reserve_contrast_supply.description: reserve a contrast agent B for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only reserve a contrast agent B for a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and the contrast agent B is available and the care sequence A is compatible with the contrast agent B
effects: Once I reserve a contrast agent B for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence A has reserved the supply B
Once I reserve a contrast agent B for a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the contrast agent B is available

release_contrast_supply.description: release a contrast agent B from a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only release a contrast agent B from a care sequence A if it is the case that the sequence A has reserved the supply B
effects: Once I release a contrast agent B from a care sequence A, it is the case that the contrast agent B is available
Once I release a contrast agent B from a care sequence A, it is not the case anymore that the sequence A has reserved the supply B

confirm_imaging_and_timeslot_and_mark_ac.description: confirm imaging and timeslot for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B, using a laboratory resource C, and assign a clinical staff D to mark acquisition ready
preconditions: I can only confirm imaging and timeslot for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B, using a laboratory resource C, and assign a clinical staff D to mark acquisition ready if it is the case that a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the sequence A uses the laboratory resource C and the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff D and an imaging timeslot is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the imaging timeslot B

I can only confirm imaging and timeslot for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B, using a laboratory resource C, and assign a clinical staff D to mark acquisition ready if it is not the case that the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm imaging and timeslot for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B, using a laboratory resource C, and assign a clinical staff D to mark acquisition ready, it is the case that the sequence A is assigned the imaging timeslot B and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed

Once I confirm imaging and timeslot for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B, using a laboratory resource C, and assign a clinical staff D to mark acquisition ready, it is not the case anymore that an imaging timeslot is available for B

coordinate_imaging_with_lab_sample_and_m.description: coordinate imaging for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B and a lab sample slot D, using an imaging staff C, and mark as pending
preconditions: I can only coordinate imaging for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B and a lab sample slot D, using an imaging staff C, and mark as pending if it is the case that a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the sequence A uses the imaging staff C and the lab sample slot D is available and an imaging timeslot is available for B and the care sequence A is compatible with the imaging timeslot B and the care sequence A is compatible with the lab sample slot D

I can only coordinate imaging for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B and a lab sample slot D, using an imaging staff C, and mark as pending if it is not the case that the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed
effects: Once I coordinate imaging for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B and a lab sample slot D, using an imaging staff C, and mark as pending, it is the case that the sequence A is assigned the imaging timeslot B and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the lab sample for A is pending and the preparation pending flag for A is set

Once I coordinate imaging for a care sequence A with an imaging timeslot B and a lab sample slot D, using an imaging staff C, and mark as pending, it is not the case anymore that an imaging timeslot is available for B and it is not the case anymore that the lab sample slot D is available

clear_lab_pending_flag_after_acquisition.description: clear lab pending flag for a care sequence A after acquisition using a laboratory resource B and a clinical staff C
preconditions: I can only clear lab pending flag for a care sequence A after acquisition using a laboratory resource B and a clinical staff C if it is the case that the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the lab sample for A is pending and the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B and the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff C
effects: Once I clear lab pending flag for a care sequence A after acquisition using a laboratory resource B and a clinical staff C, it is not the case anymore that the lab sample for A is pending and it is not the case anymore that the preparation pending flag for A is set

confirm_staff_and_transport_for_post_pre.description: confirm staff and transport for post preparation of a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B, a clinical staff C, and a transport team D
preconditions: I can only confirm staff and transport for post preparation of a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B, a clinical staff C, and a transport team D if it is the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B and the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff C and the care sequence A needs the operational resource D

I can only confirm staff and transport for post preparation of a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B, a clinical staff C, and a transport team D if it is not the case that the preparation pending flag for A is set and it is not the case that the staffing for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm staff and transport for post preparation of a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B, a clinical staff C, and a transport team D, it is the case that the staffing for A is confirmed

confirm_staff_and_transport_with_contras.description: confirm staff and transport with contrast for a care sequence A using an imaging staff B, a contrast agent C, and an escort service D
preconditions: I can only confirm staff and transport with contrast for a care sequence A using an imaging staff B, a contrast agent C, and an escort service D if it is the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the sequence A uses the imaging staff B and the sequence A has reserved the supply C and the care sequence A needs the operational resource D

I can only confirm staff and transport with contrast for a care sequence A using an imaging staff B, a contrast agent C, and an escort service D if it is not the case that the staffing for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm staff and transport with contrast for a care sequence A using an imaging staff B, a contrast agent C, and an escort service D, it is the case that the staffing for A is confirmed and the preparation pending flag for A is set

finalize_procedure_and_clear_pending.description: finalize procedure and clear pending for a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B and assigned to a clinical staff C
preconditions: I can only finalize procedure and clear pending for a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B and assigned to a clinical staff C if it is the case that the staffing for A is confirmed and the preparation pending flag for A is set and the sequence A uses the laboratory resource B and the sequence A is assigned to the clinical staff C
effects: Once I finalize procedure and clear pending for a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B and assigned to a clinical staff C, it is the case that the procedure for A is finalized

Once I finalize procedure and clear pending for a care sequence A using a laboratory resource B and assigned to a clinical staff C, it is not the case anymore that the preparation pending flag for A is set and it is not the case anymore that preparation is completed for the sequence A and it is not the case anymore that the lab sample for A is pending

reconfirm_device_and_nurse_before_imagin.description: reconfirm an imaging device B and an assigned nurse C before imaging for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only reconfirm an imaging device B and an assigned nurse C before imaging for a care sequence A if it is the case that the procedure for A is finalized and the staffing for A is confirmed and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and A has a reservation for the imaging device B and the assigned nurse C is available
I can only reconfirm an imaging device B and an assigned nurse C before imaging for a care sequence A if it is not the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A
effects: Once I reconfirm an imaging device B and an assigned nurse C before imaging for a care sequence A, it is the case that preparation is completed for the sequence A

mark_device_check_complete.description: mark device check complete for a care sequence A with an imaging device B
preconditions: I can only mark device check complete for a care sequence A with an imaging device B if it is the case that the staffing for A is confirmed and preparation is completed for the sequence A and A has a reservation for the imaging device B

I can only mark device check complete for a care sequence A with an imaging device B if it is not the case that the preparation pending flag for A is set and it is not the case that the device check for A is completed
effects: Once I mark device check complete for a care sequence A with an imaging device B, it is the case that the device check for A is completed

mark_device_check_complete_with_prep_res.description: mark device check complete for a care sequence A using a patient prep resource B
preconditions: I can only mark device check complete for a care sequence A using a patient prep resource B if it is the case that the staffing for A is confirmed and preparation is completed for the sequence A and the preparation resource B is available

I can only mark device check complete for a care sequence A using a patient prep resource B if it is not the case that the preparation pending flag for A is set and it is not the case that the device check for A is completed
effects: Once I mark device check complete for a care sequence A using a patient prep resource B, it is the case that the device check for A is completed
Once I mark device check complete for a care sequence A using a patient prep resource B, it is not the case anymore that the preparation resource B is available

reserve_protocol_timeslot_mapping.description: reserve protocol timeslot mapping for a care sequence A with an imaging protocol B
preconditions: I can only reserve protocol timeslot mapping for a care sequence A with an imaging protocol B if it is the case that the device check for A is completed and the protocol B is available and the sequence protocol link for A is B
effects: Once I reserve protocol timeslot mapping for a care sequence A with an imaging protocol B, it is the case that the care sequence A supports the imaging protocol B
Once I reserve protocol timeslot mapping for a care sequence A with an imaging protocol B, it is not the case anymore that the protocol B is available

provider_confirm_protocol_for_sequence.description: provider confirm protocol an imaging protocol C for sequence an ordering provider A at a referring facility B
preconditions: I can only provider confirm protocol an imaging protocol C for sequence an ordering provider A at a referring facility B if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and the referral for A is confirmed and A requires the protocol C and the care sequence B supports the imaging protocol C
I can only provider confirm protocol an imaging protocol C for sequence an ordering provider A at a referring facility B if it is not the case that the protocol C is approved for the sequence A
effects: Once I provider confirm protocol an imaging protocol C for sequence an ordering provider A at a referring facility B, it is the case that the protocol C is approved for the sequence A

confirm_escort_and_mark_ready.description: confirm escort and mark ready for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C
preconditions: I can only confirm escort and mark ready for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C if it is the case that the sequence A is registered and the referral for A is confirmed and preparation is completed for the sequence A and the device check for A is completed and A has a reservation for the imaging device B and the assigned nurse C is available
I can only confirm escort and mark ready for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C if it is not the case that escort or transport is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm escort and mark ready for a care sequence A using an imaging device B with an assigned nurse C, it is the case that escort or transport is confirmed for A

complete_final_checks_and_close_sequence.description: complete final checks and close sequence for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only complete final checks and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is the case that a final check is required for A and the sequence A is registered and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the staffing for A is confirmed and the device check for A is completed and preparation is completed for the sequence A
I can only complete final checks and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is not the case that the sequence for A is completed
effects: Once I complete final checks and close sequence for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence for A is completed

complete_final_checks_with_protocol_and_.description: complete final checks with an imaging protocol B and close sequence for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only complete final checks with an imaging protocol B and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is the case that the referral for A is confirmed and the sequence A is registered and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the staffing for A is confirmed and the device check for A is completed and preparation is completed for the sequence A and the protocol B is approved for the sequence A
I can only complete final checks with an imaging protocol B and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is not the case that the sequence for A is completed
effects: Once I complete final checks with an imaging protocol B and close sequence for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence for A is completed

complete_final_checks_with_escort_and_cl.description: complete final checks with escort and close sequence for a care sequence A
preconditions: I can only complete final checks with escort and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is the case that the referral for A is confirmed and the sequence A is registered and a slot is allocated for the sequence A and the imaging acquisition for A is confirmed and the staffing for A is confirmed and the device check for A is completed and preparation is completed for the sequence A and escort or transport is confirmed for A
I can only complete final checks with escort and close sequence for a care sequence A if it is not the case that the sequence for A is completed
effects: Once I complete final checks with escort and close sequence for a care sequence A, it is the case that the sequence for A is completed

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a care sequence or a appointment slot or a imaging timeslot or a clinical staff or a laboratory resource or a imaging staff or a imaging device or a patient prep resource or a imaging protocol or a assigned nurse or a lab sample slot or a contrast agent or a operational resource is also a object
Everything that is a transport team or a escort service is also a operational resource
Everything that is a referring facility sequence or a ordering provider sequence is also a care sequence
